infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: CrunchTime Fitness Training uses the camera for trainer video calls and to capture fitness photos or videos you choose to upload.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: CrunchTime Fitness Training uses the microphone for trainer video calls and videos you choose to record.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: CrunchTime Fitness Training accesses your photo library only when you choose a fitness photo or video to upload to your trainer.

plugins.photosPermission: CrunchTime Fitness Training accesses your photo library only when you choose a fitness photo or video to upload to your trainer.
plugins.cameraPermission: CrunchTime Fitness Training uses the camera to capture fitness photos or videos you choose to upload.
plugins.microphonePermission: CrunchTime Fitness Training uses the microphone for videos you choose to record.
